overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character walking through dimly lit industrial corridors, briefly interacting with an NPC named Judy, passing through a security checkpoint, and emerging into a rain-slicked neon-lit alleyway with holographic advertisements and vibrant cyan and pink lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor with green graffiti walls

events.description: dialogue interaction with Judy Alvarez who is leaning against the wall

agents.ego_description: walking down the corridor and stopping briefly to speak with Judy who is standing against the wall

notable_agents.action: Judy Alvarez leaning against the concrete wall with arms crossed, engaging in conversation with the player

entered.detail: overhead industrial fluorescent tube lighting illuminating the corridor
concrete wall painted green with red graffiti tags and markings
closed metal roll-up shutter door with horizontal slats

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a narrow industrial corridor with green graffiti-covered walls and harsh overhead fluorescent lighting. An NPC named Judy stands leaning against the left wall, and the player stops to engage in a brief dialogue interaction with her before continuing.

scene_state.functional_zone: long industrial hallway with graffiti and utility fixtures

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the long corridor toward the security gate at the far end

entered.detail: metal mesh security gate blocking the end of the corridor
wall-mounted industrial air conditioning unit with vents
metal drainage grate embedded in the concrete floor

segments.scene_description: The player continues walking down the lengthy corridor, passing various graffiti-covered walls and industrial elements. The camera approaches a metal security gate at the end of the hallway, with air conditioning units visible mounted on the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: security checkpoint room transitioning to outdoor alley

events.description: security gate opens and player enters the small transition room
exit gate opens revealing the outdoor alley with neon signs and wet pavement

agents.ego_description: passing through the security gate into a small room, then exiting to the outdoor alleyway

entered.detail: illuminated green access panel with glowing buttons mounted on the wall
solid green metal door with frame leading to the outside
red barrels and bags stacked against the wall in the corner
large illuminated MARKET sign visible through the opening exit gate
tall brick building walls forming the sides of the outdoor alley

segments.scene_description: The player passes through the opening security gate into a small transitional room with a green exit door and storage items. After a brief moment, the exit gate opens to reveal a rain-slicked outdoor alley with a large illuminated MARKET sign visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow neon-lit alley with holographic advertisements and atmospheric steam

events.description: entering the narrow alley with intense cyan and pink neon lighting replacing the dim green indoor lighting

agents.ego_description: turning into and walking through the narrow neon-lit alley toward the large holographic skull advertisement

entered.detail: large blue holographic projection of a skull floating above the alley end
bright cyan neon tubes running along the left wall
pink neon signs and lighting fixtures on the right wall
steam rising from vents on the wet asphalt ground creating atmosphere
pink neon sign reading Fingers MD mounted on a building

segments.scene_description: The player turns into a narrow alleyway bathed in vibrant cyan and pink neon light, with steam rising from the wet asphalt. A massive holographic skull advertisement floats in the distance, and the player walks toward it, passing various neon signs including one for Fingers MD.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sterile, dimly lit industrial interior into a vibrant, rain-soaked neon cityscape. It begins in a narrow corridor with green graffiti and harsh fluorescent lighting, where the camera briefly pauses for a dialogue interaction with Judy. As the movement continues down the lengthy hallway past wall-mounted air conditioning units, the camera approaches and passes through a metal security gate into a small transitional room. The scene then opens as an exit gate reveals a rain-slicked outdoor alley, shifting the atmosphere from industrial gray to a world of glowing cyan and pink light. Finally, the camera moves deeper into the alleyway through rising steam and past a Fingers MD sign, heading toward a massive holographic skull advertisement floating in the distance.
